summary:
Detailed implementation plan to fix two classes of bugs on the landing page:
1. Hardcoded Vietnamese strings in LandingFeatures.tsx preview components (AIAgentPreview, DeepResearchPreview, AnalyticsPreview) and Hero.tsx social proof badge that bypass the i18n system
2. Hardcoded bg-white/bg-black and other non-theme-aware colors in BentoGrid.tsx, LandingUseCases.tsx, and preview sub-components

Includes exact line numbers, proposed translation keys for both EN and VI, and specific CSS class replacements.
